content:textarea:1:22.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:1:22.html: Echelon seeks to mobilize the next generation for The Salvation Army of Greater Charlotte by providing opportunities for young professionals to engage with the organization through fellowship and networking, donations and fundraising, and service and volunteering. These activities directly support Salvation Army services in the Charlotte community. Whether we are serving, attending one of our social events, or raising money, you will find Echelon is a connected community full of people who are making a difference.
content:textarea:1:22.content: Echelon seeks to mobilize the next generation for The Salvation Army of Greater Charlotte by providing opportunities for young professionals to engage with the organization through fellowship and networking, donations and fundraising, and service and volunteering. content:wysiwyg_basic:2:47.manualContent:
Learn more about The Salvation Army of Greater Charlotte's young professionals networking chapter.

Thursday, May 14th
6pm-8:30pm

Pins Mechanical
307 Tremont Ave
Charlotte, NC 28203

Register Online

For more information, contact Cierra Ivey.

content:wysiwyg_basic:13:52.html:
• Exclusive networking events and leadership development opportunities
  • Access to mentorship and connections within the Charlotte business community
  • Engaging volunteer activities that support your neighbors in need
  • A supportive community of like-minded peers
